mapper.sql: A.SMS_HISTORY_ID, A.REQUEST_ID, A.SENT_AT, A.RECEIVER_NO, A.SENDER_NO, A.SEND_TYPE, A.SEND_STATUS, A.RESULT_CD, A.RESULT_MSG, A.UPD_DTTM

sql.if: AND A.SENT_AT >= TO_TIMESTAMP(#{sentAt} || '000000', 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND A.SENT_AT < TO_TIMESTAMP(#{sentAt} || '000000', 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') + INTERVAL '1' DAY

mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM SMS.SMS_HISTORY A WHERE 1 = 1

SELECT FROM SMS.SMS_HISTORY A WHERE 1 = 1
ORDER BY A.SENT_AT DESC, A.SMS_HISTORY_ID DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY

SELECT FROM SMS.SMS_HISTORY A WHERE 1 = 1
ORDER BY A.SENT_AT DESC, A.SMS_HISTORY_ID DESC FETCH NEXT 50000 ROWS ONLY
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SMS.SMS_HISTORY ( SENT_AT, RECEIVER_NO, SENDER_NO, SEND_TYPE, SEND_STATUS, RESULT_CD, RESULT_MSG, UPD_DTTM ) VALUES ( #{sentAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{receiverNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{senderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sendType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sendStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{resultCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{resultMsg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSTIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE SMS.SMS_HISTORY SET SENT_AT = #{sentAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, RECEIVER_NO = #{receiverNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SENDER_NO = #{senderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SEND_TYPE = #{sendType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SEND_STATUS = #{sendStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RESULT_CD = #{resultCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RESULT_MSG = #{resultMsg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPD_DTTM = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE SMS_HISTORY_ID = #{smsHistoryId,jdbcType=NUMERIC} AND (UPD_DTTM = #{beforeUpdDttm,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} OR (UPD_DTTM IS NULL AND #{beforeUpdDttm,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} IS NULL))
